apps.name: Turbo Music
apps.summary: YouTube Music-style streaming app. Dark red UI, threaded playback, shuffle and repeat.
apps.description: Turbo Music is a Python/KivyMD Android app that lets you stream music from YouTube with a clean, dark interface inspired by YouTube Music. All stream fetching happens on background threads so the UI stays smooth. Supports shuffle, repeat, and full playback controls.

changelog.note: Fixed rapid-cycling playback bug. Wired shuffle and repeat modes.
Threaded stream fetching. UI no longer freezes on load.
Initial release with basic playback and search.

apps.name: SSC Reasoning Practice
apps.summary: 15+ question generators for SSC CGL/CHSL reasoning. Tracks progress via SQLite.
apps.description: A full-featured offline reasoning practice app for SSC CGL and CHSL preparation. Generates deterministic, unlimited questions for number series, coding-decoding, blood relations, analogies, and more. All progress is tracked locally via SQLite.

changelog.note: Added 5 new question types. Redesigned progress dashboard.
Initial release with 10 question generators and SQLite tracking.

apps.name: TURBO DASH
apps.summary: Pseudo-3D car racing game built with Pygame. Touch controls, increasing difficulty.
apps.description: A fun pseudo-3D segment-based racing game built with Python and Pygame. Uses perspective projection to render a 3D-looking road on a 2D canvas. Touch buttons for mobile. Speed and obstacle frequency increase as you progress.
